openmeter/taxcode/adapter.purpose: Ent/PostgreSQL adapter implementing taxcode.Repository. Owns all DB reads and writes for TaxCode and OrganizationDefaultTaxCodes entities, including JSONB containment queries and soft-delete semantics.

patterns.name: TransactingRepo on every method
patterns.description: Every exported method wraps its body in entutils.TransactingRepo or TransactingRepoWithNoValue. This rebinds to any caller-supplied ctx-bound Ent transaction, preventing partial writes in multi-step flows.
patterns.example: return entutils.TransactingRepo(ctx, a, func(ctx context.Context, a *adapter) (taxcode.TaxCode, error) { ... })

patterns.name: Tx/WithTx/Self triad
patterns.description: adapter implements Tx(ctx) via HijackTx+NewTxDriver, WithTx(ctx, tx) via NewTxClientFromRawConfig, and Self() to satisfy entutils.TransactingRepo's TxCreator+TxUser contract. All three are required.
patterns.example: func (a *adapter) WithTx(ctx context.Context, tx *entutils.TxDriver) *adapter { txClient := entdb.NewTxClientFromRawConfig(ctx, *tx.GetConfig()); return &adapter{db: txClient.Client(), logger: a.logger} }

patterns.name: Soft-delete via SetDeletedAt
patterns.description: DeleteTaxCode sets deleted_at to clock.Now() rather than issuing a hard DELETE. All read queries add Where(taxcodedb.DeletedAtIsNil()) to filter deleted rows.

patterns.name: input.Validate() as first statement
patterns.description: Every exported method calls input.Validate() before any DB access and returns immediately on error.
patterns.example: if err := input.Validate(); err != nil { return taxcode.TaxCode{}, err }

patterns.name: JSONB containment via raw sql.P predicate
patterns.description: GetTaxCodeByAppMapping uses a raw sql.P predicate (app_mappings @> '...') because Ent has no native JSONB containment operator. The pattern is marshaled from []taxcode.TaxCodeAppMapping.

patterns.name: Ent error mapping to domain errors
patterns.description: db.IsNotFound maps to domain-specific NewTaxCodeNotFoundError; db.IsConstraintError maps to models.NewGenericConflictError. Never return raw Ent errors to callers.

patterns.name: Config with models.Validator compile-time assertion
patterns.description: Config implements models.Validator via var _ models.Validator = (*Config)(nil). New() calls config.Validate() before constructing the adapter.

key_file_guides.role: Adapter constructor, Config validation, and the Tx/WithTx/Self triad required by entutils.TransactingRepo.
key_file_guides.watch_for: All three transaction rebinding methods must be present or entutils.TransactingRepo will fail to compile.

key_file_guides.role: CRUD operations (Create, Update, List, Get, GetByAppMapping, Delete) implementing taxcode.Repository.
key_file_guides.watch_for: GetTaxCodeByAppMapping uses a raw JSONB @> predicate; if taxcode.TaxCodeAppMapping struct fields change, the marshaled JSON must remain compatible with the stored column format.

key_file_guides.role: GetOrganizationDefaultTaxCodes and UpsertOrganizationDefaultTaxCodes with ON CONFLICT UPSERT and optional edge expansion.
key_file_guides.watch_for: UpsertOrganizationDefaultTaxCodes uses sql.ConflictWhere(sql.IsNull(DeletedAt)) — partial unique index requires this predicate or the conflict clause does not fire correctly.

key_file_guides.role: MapTaxCodeFromEntity translates *db.TaxCode to taxcode.TaxCode domain type.
key_file_guides.watch_for: lo.FromPtr(entity.AppMappings) silently returns a zero-value slice when the column is NULL — new nullable fields need the same nil-safe treatment.

anti_patterns: Calling a.db.TaxCode.* directly inside a helper without entutils.TransactingRepo — the helper falls off the ctx-bound transaction.
Hard-deleting rows with .Remove() instead of setting deleted_at via SetDeletedAt.
Adding raw SQL outside a sql.P/sql.Selector wrapper — bypasses Ent's query builder.
Returning raw Ent errors without mapping via db.IsNotFound/db.IsConstraintError.
Skipping input.Validate() before DB access — the adapter is the last line of defense.

decisions.decision: entutils.TransactingRepo on every method, not only explicit tx callers.
decisions.rationale: Ent transactions are carried implicitly in ctx; any helper holding a raw *entdb.Client falls off the transaction unless it rebinds via TransactingRepo.

decisions.decision: JSONB containment query via raw sql.Selector for GetTaxCodeByAppMapping.
decisions.rationale: Ent has no built-in @> operator for JSONB array containment; the raw predicate is the only way to express 'find rows whose app_mappings array contains this element'.

code_examples.scenario: Add a new mutating Repository method following the existing pattern.

openmeter/taxcode/service.purpose: Business-logic layer for tax codes implementing taxcode.Service. Enforces system-managed protection, get-or-create conflict retry, and wraps all adapter calls in transaction.Run to guarantee atomicity.

patterns.name: transaction.Run wraps every adapter call
patterns.description: Every service method wraps its adapter delegation in transaction.Run (or transaction.RunWithNoValue for void returns) so multi-step operations (guard read + write) are atomic.
patterns.example: return transaction.Run(ctx, s.adapter, func(ctx context.Context) (taxcode.TaxCode, error) { return s.adapter.CreateTaxCode(ctx, input) })

patterns.name: IsManagedBySystem guard before mutations
patterns.description: UpdateTaxCode and DeleteTaxCode fetch the existing record inside the transaction and return models.NewGenericConflictError(taxcode.ErrTaxCodeManagedBySystem) if IsManagedBySystem() is true and input.AllowAnnotations is false.

patterns.name: GetOrCreate with conflict retry
patterns.description: GetOrCreateByAppMapping handles a create→conflict race by catching models.IsGenericConflictError and retrying with GetTaxCodeByAppMapping. This is idempotent under concurrent requests.

patterns.name: input.Validate() at service entry
patterns.description: Every exported method validates input before any adapter call, returning early on error.
patterns.example: if err := input.Validate(); err != nil { return taxcode.TaxCode{}, err }

patterns.name: Key derivation convention for auto-created tax codes
patterns.description: GetOrCreateByAppMapping derives the key as '<AppType>_<TaxCode>' when auto-creating a new record from an app mapping.

key_file_guides.role: Service struct constructor and Config validation. Holds the taxcode.Repository adapter dependency.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Service depends only on taxcode.Repository — never import Ent directly here.

key_file_guides.role: All TaxCode CRUD plus GetOrCreateByAppMapping. The get-then-mutate pattern inside transaction.Run provides atomicity.
key_file_guides.watch_for: The get-then-mutate pattern is only safe because the adapter's TransactingRepo rebinds to the same transaction. Breaking that rebinding makes the IsManagedBySystem guard non-atomic.

key_file_guides.role: GetOrganizationDefaultTaxCodes and UpsertOrganizationDefaultTaxCodes. Validates that both referenced tax code IDs belong to the same namespace before upsert.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Cross-namespace check is done by calling s.GetTaxCode (not the adapter directly) so namespace scoping is enforced.

key_file_guides.role: Integration tests for system-managed protection and user-managed CRUD via taxcodetestutils.NewTestEnv.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Tests use t.Context() — never context.Background(). env.DBSchemaMigrate(t) must be called before first DB access.

key_file_guides.role: Integration tests for upsert idempotency, cross-namespace rejection, expand behavior.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Same t.Context() and DBSchemaMigrate requirements as taxcode_test.go.

anti_patterns: Calling adapter methods outside transaction.Run — loses atomicity for get-then-mutate flows.
Skipping IsManagedBySystem check in new mutating methods — allows external callers to overwrite system-synced records.
Using context.Background() instead of t.Context() in tests.
Implementing key derivation or conflict retry logic inside the adapter — business logic belongs in the service layer.
Adding adapter dependencies beyond taxcode.Repository — the service must stay decoupled from Ent directly.

decisions.decision: transaction.Run at the service layer in addition to entutils.TransactingRepo in the adapter.
decisions.rationale: Multi-step flows (guard read + write) must be atomic; starting the transaction at the service layer ensures both the IsManagedBySystem read and the write share the same transaction.

decisions.decision: AllowAnnotations flag on UpdateTaxCodeInput/DeleteTaxCodeInput to bypass system-managed protection.
decisions.rationale: The LLM cost sync job needs to update system-managed records; a flag is safer than removing the guard or exposing a separate internal method.

code_examples.scenario: Add a new mutating service method with system-managed guard and transaction wrapping.

openmeter/taxcode/testutils.purpose: Self-contained test environment for taxcode integration tests. Wires a real Postgres DB, Ent client, adapter, and service from primitives without importing app/common, preventing import cycles.

patterns.name: Full stack from primitives without app/common
patterns.description: NewTestEnv constructs testutils.TestDB → entdb.Client → taxcodeadapter → taxcodeservice.New directly, avoiding the Wire DI graph and any circular import.
patterns.example: adapter, err := taxcodeadapter.New(taxcodeadapter.Config{Client: client, Logger: logger}); svc, err := taxcodeservice.New(taxcodeservice.Config{Adapter: adapter, Logger: logger})

patterns.name: sync.Once for safe Close
patterns.description: TestEnv.Close uses sync.Once to prevent double-close when both t.Cleanup and explicit calls race.

patterns.name: DBSchemaMigrate called explicitly per test
patterns.description: Tests call env.DBSchemaMigrate(t) before first DB access; this runs client.Schema.Create(t.Context()) on the isolated pgtestdb database.

patterns.name: Close order: EntClient then EntDriver then PGDriver
patterns.description: Close must close the Ent client first, then EntDriver, then PGDriver in that order to avoid leaking the pgtestdb template database.

key_file_guides.role: Sole file. Exports NewTestEnv and TestEnv with Logger, Service, and Client fields for use in _test packages.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Both EntDriver and PGDriver must be closed in Close(); omitting PGDriver leaks the pgtestdb template database.

anti_patterns: Importing app/common in testutils — creates import cycles and couples test setup to the full DI graph.
Calling env.Close before env.DBSchemaMigrate — the schema won't exist for the test.
Using context.Background() instead of t.Context() in DBSchemaMigrate or service calls.
Skipping t.Cleanup registration for Close — leaks DB connections if tests fail mid-setup.

decisions.decision: Build adapter and service directly from constructors rather than via Wire.
decisions.rationale: Keeps test helpers independent from app/common so unrelated wiring changes do not create test-only import cycles.
